messages.content: Hello, how can I help you?
Who won the indian premier league in 2022?
This is the last edition of the Indian Premier League (IPL) in 2022. It was won by Chennai Super Kings.

evidence: Who won the indian premier league in 2022?
It was won by Chennai Super Kings.
